offer: For Etsy sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We automate accounts payable reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation using spreadsheets.
problem: Difficulty in reconciling invoices with purchase orders
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Etsy sellers
Indie Hackers discussions on invoice management
DM outreach to Etsy sellers with demo video
Community forums for Etsy seller tools
try_it: Let users try invoice tracking on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as reusable templates
Enable CSV import for existing data
